query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `order_fingerprints` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `order_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `order_no` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `source` VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `user_agent` TEXT,
  `device_id` VARCHAR(128),
  `sales_id` INT,
  `customer_id` INT,
  `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_ip_date` (`ip_address`, `created_at`),
  INDEX `idx_order_id` (`order_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sales_login_ips` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `sales_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `login_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_sales_login` (`sales_id`, `login_at`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `fraud_alerts` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `order_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `order_no` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `fraud_type` VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `sales_id` INT,
  `customer_id` INT,
  `original_multiplier` DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.00,
  `penalty_multiplier` DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.50,
  `original_discount_amount` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `details` TEXT,
  `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_order_id` (`order_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referee_payment_milestones` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `referee_id` INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `referee_name` VARCHAR(128),
  `referrer_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `total_paid_amount` DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `milestone_reached` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `milestone_amount` DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 500.00,
  `reward_triggered_at` DATETIME,
  `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_referee_id` (`referee_id`),
  INDEX `idx_referrer_id` (`referrer_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `winback_coupons` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `churn_alert_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `customer_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `customer_name` VARCHAR(128),
  `sales_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `coupon_code` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `discount_rate` DECIMAL(4,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.85,
  `status` ENUM('ACTIVE','USED','EXPIRED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
  `used_order_id` INT,
  `expires_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
  `used_at` DATETIME,
  `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_churn_alert` (`churn_alert_id`),
  INDEX `idx_customer_status` (`customer_id`, `status`)
);
